"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-74", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "## Summary

Administrator can perform JNDI attack through specially crafted DB2 jdbc url leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE).

## Impact

If GeoServer has DB2 extension installed, this vulnerability can lead to executing arbitrary code.

## Details

Authenticated users can access Vector Data Sources page to creating a new data store through db2 jdbc connection, performing JNDI attack due to unrestricted connection parameters, and then achieve RCE with deserialization of untrusted data.

### Remediation

This issue has been fixed in this release: https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver/releases/tag/2.27.0.

## References

* https://osgeo-org.atlassian.net/browse/GEOT-7725
* https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/cve-2023-27867", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00582, "percentile": 0.43527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-11T20:34:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-27511"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T16:16:50Z", "published_at": "2026-06-11T20:34:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver/security/advisories/GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7", "https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver/releases/tag/2.27.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-27511", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/cve-2023-27867", "https://osgeo-org.atlassian.net/browse/GEOT-7725", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/geoserver/geoserver/security-advisories/GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver", "summary": "GeoServer DB2 DataStore Extension has a JNDI Vulnerability via Store Connection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-15T21:49:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g628-r368-6vh7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.27.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.geoserver.extension:gs-db2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.27.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: GeoServer DB2 DataStore Extension has a JNDI Vulnerability via Store Connection
